EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriTinError

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Esri TIN's error codes.

[Guid("D480C984-2B4D-11D3-AB2E-0008C73FD50C")]
public enum esriTinError

Fields

E_TIN_ALREADY_INITIALIZED = -2147199968

-2147199968: The object has already been initialized.

E_TIN_BAD_CLASS_BREAKS = -2147199942

-2147199942: Class-breaks is not defined or empty.

E_TIN_BAD_CLASS_CODES = -2147199941

-2147199941: Class-break-codes does not match class-breaks.

E_TIN_BAD_VALUE = -2147199934

-2147199934: The function call contains inadequate argument value.

E_TIN_BELOW_V8 = -2147199937

-2147199937: The operation is supported only for TINs with version 8 or above.

E_TIN_CANCELLED = -2147199931

-2147199931: Process is cancelled by the user.

E_TIN_CANNOT_CREATE_GEOMETRY = -2147199983

-2147199983: Failed to create a geometry object, or a geometric process failed.

E_TIN_CANNOT_CREATE_OBJ = -2147199944

-2147199944: Failed to to create an object.

E_TIN_DIFFERENT_TIN = -2147199956

-2147199956: The input TIN element does not belong to this TIN.

E_TIN_EMPTY_OBJECT = -2147199997

-2147199997: Attempt to access an empty object.

E_TIN_EXTENSION_DISABLED = -2147199938

-2147199938: 3D Extension not enabled.

E_TIN_FAILED_RESET_EXTENT = -2147199927

-2147199927: Unable to reset extent. TIN contains data.

E_TIN_FAILED_TO_COPY = -2147199991

-2147199991: Can't copy the TIN dataset.

E_TIN_FAILED_TO_CREATE_FILE = -2147199963

-2147199963: Failed to create file.

E_TIN_FAILED_TO_DELETE = -2147199989

-2147199989: Can't delete the TIN dataset.

E_TIN_FAILED_TO_DELETE_FILE = -2147199961

-2147199961: Failed to delete file.

E_TIN_FAILED_TO_OPEN = -2147199993

-2147199993: Can't open the specified TIN.

E_TIN_FAILED_TO_OPEN_FILE = -2147199962

-2147199962: Failed to open file.

E_TIN_FAILED_TO_OVER_WRITE = -2147199972

-2147199972: Failed to over write the TIN.

E_TIN_FAILED_TO_RENAME = -2147199990

-2147199990: Can't rename the TIN dataset or workspace.

E_TIN_FAILED_TO_SAVE = -2147199992

-2147199992: Can't save the TIN dataset.

E_TIN_FAILED_TO_SWAP = -2147199966

-2147199966: Failed to swap edges.

E_TIN_FAILED_UPDATE_SEED = -2147199951

-2147199951: Failed to update the seed.

E_TIN_FATAL = -2147199933

-2147199933: A general function failure has occured during the specified operation.

E_TIN_FDS_FATAL = -2147199932

-2147199932: A TIN memory-management general function failure has occured during the specified operation.

E_TIN_FIELD_ALREADY_EXISTS = -2147199977

-2147199977: The specified field name already exists.

E_TIN_FIELD_ERROR = -2147199955

-2147199955: An error occurs while accessing/writing to a field.

E_TIN_FILE_EXISTS = -2147199988

-2147199988: The specified file or dataset already exists.

E_TIN_FILTER_REQUIRED = -2147199948

-2147199948: A filter is required for this operation.

E_TIN_GEOMETRY_HAS_NO_Z = -2147199960

-2147199960: The input geometry does not contain Z.

E_TIN_HAS_NO_VALUE = -2147199979

-2147199979: The specified TIN element type does not have tag values.

E_TIN_HAS_VOID_Z = -2147199980

-2147199980: The input point(s) contains Void Z.

E_TIN_INDEX_OUT_OF_RANGE = -2147199970

-2147199970: The specified index is out of range.

E_TIN_INTERNAL_ERROR = -2147199949

-2147199949: Encountered an internal process error.

E_TIN_INVALID_LANDXML_FILE = -2147199928

-2147199928: Invalid LandXML file.

E_TIN_INVALID_NAME = -2147199969

-2147199969: The specified name is invalid.

E_TIN_IN_EDIT_MODE = -2147199985

-2147199985: TIN is in edit mode.

E_TIN_IN_MEMORY_EDIT = -2147199936

-2147199936: The operation cannot be conducted when TIN is in memory-edit mode.

E_TIN_LICENSE_NOT_AVAILABLE = -2147199939

-2147199939: 3D License not available.

E_TIN_MEMORY_TIN = -2147199967

-2147199967: The specied operation cannot be applied to a non-persisted TIN.

E_TIN_METADATA_ERROR = -2147199945

-2147199945: Failed to handle metadata.

E_TIN_MUST_BE_DELAUNAY = -2147199930

-2147199930: The process cannot be applied on a non-Delaunay TIN.

E_TIN_NAN = -2147199965

-2147199965: The input (value) is/contains a NAN (not a number).

E_TIN_NEED_TRIANGLE_SEED = -2147199954

-2147199954: This operation requires a triangle seed.

E_TIN_NEED_VALUE = -2147199973

-2147199973: Require to specify non-zero node/edge/triangle value(s) from input.

E_TIN_NODE_SHARED = -2147199950

-2147199950: The specified node is shared by other poly object(s).

E_TIN_NODE_UNDELETABL = -2147199978

-2147199978: The specified node has void Z, or is shared by other poly objects, or the polygon has only three vertices.

E_TIN_NOT_IN_EDIT_MODE = -2147199984

-2147199984: TIN is not in edit mode.

E_TIN_NOT_PROJECTED_SYSTEM = -2147199946

-2147199946: A projected coordinate system is required.

E_TIN_NO_SPATIALREF_INFO = -2147199947

-2147199947: Spatial reference information is missing, or insufficient, for the operation.

E_TIN_NULL_FIELD_VALUE = -2147199926

-2147199926: One or more input features contain NULL Shape or field value.

E_TIN_NUMERIC_LIMIT = -2147199994

-2147199994: A process has encounted a numeric problem, it may not be complete.

E_TIN_OBJECT_NOT_EMPTY = -2147199976

-2147199976: The input feature class/raster is not empty.

E_TIN_OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED = -2147199987

-2147199987: The specified operation/method is not supported.

E_TIN_OUT_OF_MEMORY = -2147199986

-2147199986: Out of memory.

E_TIN_POLYGON_NOT_DEFINED = -2147199982

-2147199982: Cannot define polygon.

E_TIN_POLYLINE_NOT_DEFINED = -2147199981

-2147199981: Cannot define polyline.

E_TIN_SUPER_NODE = -2147199964

-2147199964: Invalid operation on a super node.

E_TIN_TOO_MANY_NODES = -2147199924

-2147199924: TIN node count exceeds limit.

E_TIN_UNHANDLED_EXCEPTION = -2147199925

-2147199925: An unhandled exception has occured during the process.

E_TIN_UNSUPPORTED_SPATIAL_REFERENCE = -2147199940

-2147199940: Unsupported spatial reference. The spatial reference cannot be exported as a projection (PRJ) file.

E_TIN_UPDATE_ERROR = -2147199943

-2147199943: An error occured while updating the TIN.

E_TIN_WORKSPACE_ALREADY_CONNECTED = -2147199998

-2147199998: TIN workspace already connected.

E_TIN_WORKSPACE_EXISTS = -2147200000

-2147200000: TIN workspace already exists.

E_TIN_WORKSPACE_NOT_CONNECTED = -2147199999

-2147199999: TIN workspace not connected.

E_TIN_WRONG_DATASET_TYPE = -2147199996

-2147199996: The specified dataset type can not be recognized.

E_TIN_WRONG_EDGE_TYPE = -2147199935

-2147199935: The specified edge type is not adequate for the operation.

E_TIN_WRONG_ELEMENT_TYPE = -2147199957

-2147199957: The input TIN element's type is not adequate.

E_TIN_WRONG_FIELD_TYPE = -2147199975

-2147199975: The type of the specified field is not adequate.

E_TIN_WRONG_GEN_SEED = -2147199952

-2147199952: Seed is not a proper for this operation.

E_TIN_WRONG_GEOMETRY_TYPE = -2147199974

-2147199974: The geometry type of the input shape, or feature class, is not adequate.

E_TIN_WRONG_SEED_TYPE = -2147199953

-2147199953: The operation requires a triangle or edge seed.

E_TIN_WRONG_SURFACE_TYPE = -2147199958

-2147199958: The input data type does not permit the specified surface type.

E_TIN_WRONG_TOPOLOGY = -2147199995

-2147199995: The TIN dataset is corrupted.

E_TIN_WRONG_VARIANT_TYPE = -2147199959

-2147199959: The input VARIANT's type is not adequate for the operation.

E_TIN_XML_CORRUPTED = -2147199929

-2147199929: The XML file is corrupted.

E_TIN_ZERO_VALUE = -2147199971

-2147199971: The input value of 'zero' is not allowed here.

Made with docfx
